cases.prompt: 수익 극대화 해줘, 세그먼트별 차등 가격이랑 심리적 가격까지 깊게

assertions.text: Produces segment-based price discrimination analysis (scale, urgency, expertise, region/PPP, timing)
Covers psychological pricing tactics like charm pricing, anchoring, decoy effect, loss aversion, and bundling
States ethical boundary guidelines and notes the user makes the final call

cases.prompt: give me an aggressive pricing psychology and willingness-to-pay analysis to maximize revenue

assertions.text: Analyzes value-metric optimization (per-seat vs usage vs feature vs outcome pricing)
Activates only because the user explicitly asked for aggressive monetization, not auto-triggered
